feedback.text: One thing that would be very good is that the Digital Fairness Act also protects video games, such as the cancellation or destruction of video games, or protects consumers from dishonest micro-transaction practices that abuse individuals vulnerable to ludopathy. Although this falls more within Gambling, it is something that has spread in both computer and console video games and phone games, which is honestly a worrying thing that has done much damage over the last decade and a half and there is no current shield to cancel such practices.
